The Luftwaffe, flying mostly Messerschmidts (ME109s) and Dorniers, have stepped up their attacks and, despite heavy casualties, are gradually wearing your squadron down. Only four months ago, you were a newcomer to the squadron; in the last few months you have seen many good pilots die horribly. Now you are an expert amongst the newcomers. User summary: Published in Danish as Gennem Pigtråden: Flugten fra Krigsfangelejren.

title: Apothecary on the Street of Dreams: Little Shop of Poisons and Potions Book #2
description: From the back cover: Have you met Griswald Grimm? You'll just die! That Master of Alchemy, Griswald Grimm is back, eith 60 new poisons and potions for the fiendishly discriminating player-character or Gamemaster! Delightful destruction, rude revenge, fearsome fogs, drastic disguises, and all manner of enviromentally safe forms of magical and non-magical chemical compounds await the adventurous, the curious and the bold.

title: Issel Warrior King
description: Au plus profond de la sombre Forêt des Gémissements, bien au-delà des terres habitées, se cache la Clairière des Rêves. C'est là - si ce lieu mystérieux n'est pas une légende - que vous pourrez accomplir la mission que le vieux Mahântor, votre maître d'armes, vous a fait jurer de mener à bien: reconquérir le trône de Franzos, usurpé par le baron Théo. Sur votre route, vous rencontrerez Darian le Magicien, lui aussi à la recherche de la Clairière des Rêves. Il sera votre fidèle allié... à moins qu'il n'ait secrètement résolu de vous trahir? Seul ou à deux, chacun muni de son propre livre et armé d'un crayon et d'une gomme, c'est de VOUS que dépend le sort d'Issel... et aussi celui de Darian!

title: Zeit des Nebels: Gralfsee II
description: user summary and from the back of the book Zeit des Nebels (Time of fog) includes 2 city adventures in the setting of the "Gralfsee", and continues the line after "Gralfsee - Im Zeichen des Widders" The two adventures have stats for AD&D, D&D, MERS, Midgard and DSA. (they also can be used as universal adventure. Der Träumende Talisman (Mario Truant) A dreamlike beautyfull trinket and a lousy reward are the start of a series of attacks and intrigue. The adventures are traped into the net of death. Can they survive and gets out of the claws of the spider? Who is hunter and who gets hunted at ... Doppeltes Spiel (Rick Davis) A Lady in trouble and a premature death gets the adventures into insoluble problems. Is it the return of the master thief or an another dark antagonist, who fools the heros? Who play with whom at ...

title: Rolling Thunder
description: From the back of the book: "THE BIG PICTURE Rolling Thunder is the first scenario pack to combine BattleTech, BattleForce, and MechWarrior Scenarios. Formed during the chaos that followed the struggle between Anton and Janos Marik, the Rolling Thunder company is a well-respected unit in the service of the Free Worlds League. Renowned equally for their warrior spirit and their battlefild scrounging, Roling Thinder is always ready and willing to fight. This scenario pack details the history of Rolling Thunder, personality profiles, and statistics for the company, as well as combat readiness of their 'Mechs. Contains 16 BattleTech scenarios, 2 BattleForce scenarios, and 2 MechWarrior scenarios"

title: Shadow Over Nordmaar
description: Super Endless Quest Adventure Gamebook #16 From Back Cover: Now you can experience all the thrills of playing the ADVANCED DUNGEONS & DRAGONS Game by yourself-- in book form! ADVANCED DUNGEONS & DRAGONS Adventure Gamebooks use a simple, unique role-playing game system based on the popular ADVANCED DUNGEONS & DRAGONS Game, incorporating two standard six-sided dice, hit points, skill points, experience points, and much more. In SHADOW OVER NORDMAAR, you are savagely beaten by unknown assailants and left for dead. When you regain consciousness, you have completely lost your memory. You can't even remember who you are! As you search for your true identity, it becomes clear that the future of Nordmaar depends on the success of your quest! ADVANCED DUNGEONS & DRAGONS Adventure Gamebooks read like books, play like games, and offer a thrill a minute-- with YOU as the hero! 26 possible endings.

title: Return to Atlantis
description: From the back of the book. On your first solo journey to find the Lost Continent of Atlantis, you fail to bring back proof of your success. Now you and your colleague Horton James III are returning to document this amazing otherworld. But back below the surface of the sea dangers abound. A treacherous king lures you to riches, rebel slaves lure you to help lead a revolt; and the evil Nodoors aim to capture you and keep you below... for good. A greedy king, evil politicians, peace loving peoples- they are all residents in the underwater world of Atlantis. Do you want to stay below to help the Atlanteans? Or do you return to the surface with proof of the lost continents existence? Will you be taken prisoner before you even get to make that choice?

title: Arret. La storia del mondo
description: from the preface of the manual Arret. History of the World This expansion presents detailed informations about the setting of the italian RPG "I Signori del Caos" 2nd Edition (The Lords of Chaos). The World is known as Arret. It's a world identical to our Earth, but lands and seas are inverted as the name itself reveal: Arret is specular to Terra which means "Earth" in Italian.

title: The First Olympics
description: From the Back of the Book: You are a contestant in the first Olympics! You and your cousin Felix are touring Olympic ruins in Greece when you wander into a dark cave. Suddenly you find yourself caught up in a procession of athletes that passes ivory-white temples along the road. You've travelled back in time to the ancient Olympic games! The contests are about to begin, and now you're a competitor. Will you sign up to compete in the wrestling event, or test your skills as a chariot driver?

title: Due cuori in gioco
description: Lupo Alberto (Albert the Wolf) is one of the most popular Italian comics characters ever. He is a wolf, but his girlfriend Marta is a hen: so, every time he goes to the poultry pen take her for an evening together, the watchdog Mosé tries to shoot him. Since November 1985, the Italian weekly magazine "Topolino" ("Mickey Mouse") featured choose-your-own-adventure comic stories with the Disney character. Probably influenced by this, the publishing house printing the monthly "Lupo Alberto" magazine released a gamebook, partly illustrated text and partly comic strip, where the reader is Lupo Albetro trying to reach Marta. The book is contained in a hardback cover that has inside "Il gioco dell'upo", a kind of Game of the Goose dedicated to the same character.

title: Vindicators
description: From the back of the book: NOW YOU CAN BECOME YOUR FAVORITE COMICS HERO! And not a moment too soon. Crime is running rampant. Natural disasters are on the rise. Sinister organizations are plotting the overthrow of civilization. There's no time to lose. Use the VINDICATORS game system to create your own crime-fighting hero. Pick weapons from the most basic to the most advanced. Use any of dozens of skills. Choose from over one hundred fantastic powers, including psionics, flight, energy control, and heightened senses. Build your strength, speed, and agility to superhuman levels. Now use the VINDICATORS quick-playing system to put your character into action: Automatic fatigue rules if you expend strength too fast. Realistic modifiers for distant or fast moving targets. Unique PAIN points for automatic handicaps Super speed rules - not just movement - that work. Fast roll game scenarios. Get ready to meet the challenge!"

title: Mystery of the Sacred Stones
description: From the Back of the Book: Can you unlock the deadly secret of the Sacred Stones? A trip to Florida seems like a great way to spend a summer vacation, until you find one of the mysterious Calusa Gull Stones. According to an ancient Indian legend, the stone has a mate, and if the two are paired, a terrible power will be unleashed. You're determine to find the stone's mate--and destroy them both--before a deadly time-traveling spirit can use their power. But will you be able to locate the other sacred stone and stop this ancient evil before it's too late?

title: Dragonfire
description: Players take on the role of Mirrim, a young dragonrider in the world of Anne McCaffrey's Pern. Accompanied by your green dragon, Path, you strive to clear your name of the theft of Ancients' artifacts from the Southern Wastes, but first you must face Thread and perform the duty of all dragonriders...

title: En Alas del Peligro
description: From the Back of the Book: Defiende a los animales y lucha contra la extinción del tigre de Bengala. Durante muchos años la caza indiscriminada del tigre de Bengala ha diezmado la población de forma alarmante. Tú perteneces a una organización que se dedica a proteger a las especies en peligro de extinción. De entre todas las misiones que la organización puede adjudicarte, la que más te atrae es la de realizar un reportaje fotográfico para ilustrar un informe que sensibilice a la opinión pública acerca de la grave situación en que se encuentra este animal. Para llevar a cabo tu misión deberás viajar a la India, donde conocerás de cerca las costumbres de este exótico país, y te enfrentarás a los peligros que te deparará la selva. ¿Qué más ocurre en esta historia? Todo depende de tus elecciones. Para tomar las decisiones correctas y llevar a cabo tu misión, es necesario que descubras las pistas auténticas que se hallan ocultas en las ilustraciones en color. Para ello dispones de un filtro en la primera página del libro. User Translation from Spanish: Defend the animals and fight the extinction of the Bengal tiger. For many years the indiscriminate hunting of the Bengal tiger has decimated the population at an alarming rate. You belong to an organisation dedicated to protecting endangered species. Of all the missions that the organisation has claimed, the most appealing to you is to make a photographic reportage to illustrate a report to sensitise the public about the serious situation in which this animal finds itself. To accomplish your mission you must go to India, where you will learn about the customs of this exotic country, and you will confront the dangers that lurk in the jungle. What else happens in this story? It all depends on your choices. To make the right decisions and carry out your mission, it is necessary to discover the real clues that are hidden in the colour illustrations. To do this you have a filter in the front page of the book.

title: Sword World RPG
description: Sword World RPG is one of Japan's most popular and long-lived fantasy role playing games. It was created by the legendary Ryo Mizuno and had cover art (only cover) by Yoshitaka Amano of Final Fantasy fame. This is the first edition core rulebook, all that is needed. Just one small pocket book.

title: Armored Assault
description: Publisher Description: PLANETARY COMBAT IN THE FAR FUTURE The long-anticipated strike on Idamarcus was underway. Unexpectedly thrust into the dire battle over this resource-rich moon in the Idorian home system, Tod Jairus and Sheri Xll donned their Powered Armor battlesuits and stumbled out of the pitching Imperial troop carrier. Rear Echelon Assets dropped relentless salvos of High Explosives among the attackers. Aerocraft streaked overhead. Idorian troops, dug deep into their fortified bunkers, poured streams of blinding firepower over the onrushing vehicles. " Correct artillery coordinates to A-C-12," screamed Sheri into her comm-link. " They're discharging MASK rounds," cried Tod as Disruptor fire sizzled overhead. "We'll hit their positions from the left. Follow me!" Engaging their armor's bioservos, Tod and Sheri catapulted themselves over the moon's cratered surface. The firefight had begun its deadly crescendo ... . Armored Assault is the vehicular expansion set for Space Master: The Role Playing Game. THE ULTIMATE IN FLEXIBILITY Now you can simulate decisive futuristic planet-bound battles! Command small unit actions with a handful of tracked AFVs, or mobilize full-blown campaigns, mustering subs, surface ships, walkers, gray tanks, artillery, aerocraft, and more! Choose Basic, Standard or Advanced Rules to define your game's level of detail and realism. Challenge yourself further by adding even more exacting Optional Rules. Armored Assault is completely compatible with the 2nd Edition Space Master: The Role Playing Game and Star Strike'"'. It includes comprehensive construction systems for tracked vehicles, infantry teams, powered armor troopers, rear echelon assets, and more. Armored Assault is the third part of the Space Master Science Fiction Trilogy. The first in the series is Space Master: The Role Playing Game, a sophisticated set of science fiction role playing rules. The second game, Space Master: Star Strike, a fast-paced simulation of interplanetary ship combat, puts you in the gunner's chair as you face. enemy starships. Play the Space Master games ' individually, or combine them to create sweeping science fiction campaigns. Since they are all compatible with Rolemaster"', you can also design festinating science-fantasy adventures! Space Master: Armored Assault includes: Assault Book •The Basic Game: Simple, easy-to-learn rules and scenarios for beginners. •The Standard Game: Comprehensive rules for a wide range of surface combat units, weapon types, scenarios, and campaign suggestions. •The Advanced Game: Rules which incorporate aerial and submersible vehicles into the action. •Optional Rules: Add-on game systems for master players who desire even more detail. •Construction Rules: Custom-design guidelines for infantry teams, powered troopers, ordnance, aerocraft, rear echelon assets, installations, robots, and all manner of vehicles. Tables and Forms Book •Combat Tables: Attack charts for auto, MLA, and lob cannons, laser, blaster, disruptor, ion and plasma cannons, as well as shaped charge, seeking explosive, proximity explosive, nuclear and matter/ antimatter warheads. Also, there are 9 critical result tables for attacks against soft and hard targets, and another 5 for personal casualties. •Game Charts: The most commonly used charts in one section for quick reference. user comment the BGG entry is Armored Assault

title: Gordon R. Dickson's Dorsai: Dorsai's Command
description: From the back of the book: A Warrior's Ultimate Test You are Mies Ohanlon, active-duty officer of the elite corps known as the Dorsai. Young and inexperienced, you are about to take on your first assignment - a raw, violent challenge that will make or break your career in the finest military force in the universe. The ruthless William of Ceta is exchanging weapons for the rare metals unearthed by a group of mountain revolutionaries. With these weapons, they will attack and plunder Ch'ung City, rendering the kingdom an open target for William's savage invaders. How will you and your men respond? Are you tough enough - and shrewd enough - to survive? And most importantly, can you uphold the Dorsai tradition of pride, strength and courage... without jeopardizing an entire planet? Combat Command book #8

title: Blazing Beacons: The Spanish Armada
description: In 1587, the catholic king of Spain, Philip II decides to unleash the Spanish fleet, the Invincible Armada against Queen Elizabeth's kingdom. The player, a young captain in his country's fleet, must carefully manoeuvre his ship, survive storms, enemy guns and boarding actions and help decide the fate of the Spanish expedition. The game allow the player to play as either a British or Spanish character, which adds extra replayability to the book. The book is #7 in the Real Life gamebooks series.

title: Firepower: A Gamer's Guide to Modern Firearms
description: Firepower is a concise resource supplement adding data and generic rules for handling firearms and automatic weapons in modern games. Written in a generic, universal approach the product was nevertheless marketed as a supplement for To Challenge Tomorrow, but also included conversion information for GDW's Twilight 2000, Hero Games' Hero System and Steve Jackson Games' GURPS.

title: The Fourth Succession War Scenarios Volume One
description: From the back of the book: "Armies of BattleMechs stride toward their objectives, razing cities with their missiles, lasers, PPCs, and autocannons on the way. The language of battle is blood, and the cries of the homeless echo in the troubled sleep of every MechWarrior." "Put yourself oto the test in 16 BattleTech, 3 BattleForce, and 2 MechWarrior scenarios from the Fourth Succession War."

title: Supplement Jorune: Playing the Iscin Races
description: From the preface: "Up to now, game masters relying strictly on the sholari guide in the boxed edition have had to restrict their players to one of three races, all human-type descendants from the original Earth colony. Although humans, muadra and boccord have offered a range of attributes and talents for players, there has always been a strong desire on the part of players to experience the thrill of playing another race entirely. Playing the Iscin Races not only adds crugar and woffen to the list of choices, but it also for the first time, offers some real insight into the 'lost children of Iscin,' the tologra (historically, culturally and playably!) Note: Blount are not heavily covered in this book because we feel that only a very small minority of players would actually derive satisfaction from asuming the role of a dim-witted, swam-dwelling, mathin-carrying frog for any length of time. The final version of this book will be released in Fall of 1989 and will include additional information on the bronth as well."

title: La Mangoranii
description: The second Anashiva Reahna book describes the Mangoranii province, in the southern part of the Ney-dora empire, and its capital city, Mangor. The book features descriptions of the Mangoranii geography, its history, the day-to-day life of its inhabitants the Mangoranenii, their laws, customs and religious beliefs. Included is a 60x60cm map of the province. The book ends with a long scenario set in Mangoranii, "Le Faux Prophète".

title: The Durandrium Find
description: Back cover summary: Without a steady supply of Andrium, the fuel for hyperdrive crafts, Imperial cruisers and provincial merchant vessels would soon drift to a halt, unable to make the jump between stars. The lone supplier of this artificial fuel API, Andrium Producers of the Imperium, an Imperially controlled manufacturer. On a routine mining operation, the Churg -- a sedentary race whose pursuits are almost purely intellectual -- make an incredible discovery: Durandrium! This naturally occurring, non-decaying element will destroy the API monopoly and provide a power source with unprecedented availability! Enter Augustus-Hayes, a once-prominent Provincial House. Now teetering on the brink of economic collapse, Augustus-Hayes could be the target for a hostile takeover! Can Augustus-Hayes acquire the gravely needed mining and distribution rights from the indifferent Churg? Or will agents of API and other factions thwart this last desperate attempt at financial rescue? SALVATION FOR HOUSE AUGUSTUS-HAYES: The Durandrium Find catapults you into the corporate world of intrigue and sabotage. In this exciting two-part adventure module you: Battle your way off the Augustus-Hayes Homeworld to the Churg System, avoiding fanatical religious orders and hostile operatives alike; Win the confidence of the Churg and convince them that contracting with Augustus-Hayes is in their own best interest, despite claims by the API to the contrary. Also included is information on the Inner Provincial House Augustus-Hayes, and detailed racial background on the humanoids of Minor Clan Churg.

title: The Morrow Project Box
description: From the back of the box: The year is 1989. As the civilized countries of the world exchange gifts of nuclear missiles, the small volunteer population of the Morrow Project sleep far away from the blossoming nuclear fireballs in a deep dreamless winter. These few people, long prepared for the holocaust which rages around them, await the time when their ever-watchful machines will awaken them. They expect the time of their cold sleep to be a mere three or four years but everything had gone well right up to the war and it was now that the infamous gremlin Murphy shifted the gears. The "cryonauts" sleep on for one hundred and fifty years before their delinquent machines finally restore them. One hundred and fifty years of eroding culture and technology; one hundred and fifty years of fall-out boosted mutations; one hundred and fifty years of dog-eat-dog survival. In the Morrow Project you will take the role of one of these "cryonauts", and by doing so place yourself in a situation of forced survival. You know nothing of the changeling world around you and find dangers around every turn. You will find yourself face-to-face with the conditions created after a nuclear war. Genetic mutations in almost every form of affected wildlife constantly surprise and endanger you; radioactive "hot spots" are an always present peril; and you find that the most dangerous animal left on Earth continues to be Mankind itself. Survival is the only rule left to a chaotic society. Somehow the separated Morrow Teams must contact one another, find their main base, and again bring civilization to the human race. They are Man's last hope for a future beyond survival, but mankind and the blasted forces of nature seem to unite in the task of destroying that last hope. Can the Morrow Teams survive in the world of 2139? CAN YOU SURVIVE??? THE MORROW PROJECT - 1989 This cult status game was originally set in 1989 - so what better year to try the Special Limited Edition Boxed Set. This contains: The Morrow Project Rules - Normal Price £5.95 Liberation at Riverton - Normal Price £5.50 G.M.'s Screen - Normal Price £3.50 All for £9.95

title: Dark Continents
description: Dark Continents is a sourcebook providing background and adventures set in a colonial genre during England's period of foreign colonization of Africa. The information includes both historical and supernatural elements. Intended as a supplement for To Challenge Tomorrow, the publisher also advertised it as compatible with Call of Cthulhu, GURPS, and Hero System. This item won the 1990 Sigma Award for Best RPG Aid. The sourcebook was reprinted at least once in 1992.

title: Advanced Phantasm Adventures Gamemaster's Handbook
description: Author Summary: Phantasm Adventures contained sixty playable races, forty classes, a unique social system, and a magic system that allowed for more than twelve hundred different kinds of magic casters.

title: Lone Wolf: The Fortress of Doom
description: From the promotional material: Are you brave enough to explore this sinister fortress? Can you outwit the creatures of evil who haunt its halls and deadly dungeons? In this fantastic telephone adventure game by Joe Dever, you will become LONE WOLF, the last Kai Lord of Sommerland. Armed with your trusty sword and powerful Kai disciplines, you must strive to find the ancient Lorestone. Will you emerge triumphant? Or will you succumb to the terrors that stalk this dread fortress? To begin your quest, just phone the number below. listen to the narrator. Choose your actions by speaking to our unique voice-activated computer. Hidden prizes await all who triumph.

title: Wares Blade Starter Set
description: Translated Title- Robot Fantasy RPG Wares Blade Start Set Basic boxed set includes a rule book, players guide, 3 10-sided dice, a sheet of stand-up figures, record sheets, and scenario book including the introductory adventure "The Mountain of the sleeping Demon" and advice for running the adventure. The contents of the set ◆ Player guide (48 pages) ◆ Rulebook(48 pages) ◆ Scenario Pack (56 pages) ◆ Character sheets 1 ◆ Character sheets 2 ◆ Magic sheets ◆ Machine Soldier sheets ◆ NPC sheets ◆ Fold-up Character counter ◆ 10 sided-dice (three)

title: The Art of the Advanced Dungeons & Dragons Fantasy Game
description: The Art of the Advanced Dungeons & Dragons Fantasy Game

title: Dungeon Masters Assistant Volume II: Characters & Treasures
description: Publisher Blurb DUNGEON MASTERS ASSISTANT, Volume II: CHARACTERS & TREASURES is SSI's latest time saver for Dungeon Masters (DMs). No longer is it necessary to spend hours populating a town or generating player characters or henchmen. Speed up your game immeasurably by generating detailed player or non-player characters, and large treasure hoards, in moments! Every facet of character generation, from languages and spell lists to class and racial abilities, is accounted for. All character classes, including multi-class characters, can be rolled up in a snap and will appear on ready-made character sheets with all the pertinent information ready to use. You can even print these sheets for instant use. All magic items from the AD&D Dungeon Masters Guide (AD&D 1e) and Unearthed Arcana, plus all treasure types from the Monster Manual (AD&D 1e) and Monster Manual II (AD&D 1e), can be generated with this powerful program. By letting the computer do most of the number-crunching work, such time consuming chores as creating large numbers of gems, jewelry, or intelligent weapons become simple tasks. Harness the power of the computer with this versatile utility - spend less time in preparation and more time enjoying AD&D game play.

title: Advanced Phantasm Adventures Players Handbook
description: Author Summary: Phantasm Adventures contained sixty playable races, forty classes, a unique social system, and a magic system that allowed for more than twelve hundred different kinds of magic casters.

title: Saga 7: Neues aus Adramil
description: user summary / from the back of the book Neues aus Adramil (News from Adramil) is a source book for SAGA. This book answers more question about the dragon cult, if there is a dragon at Nir... time table background maps and drawings NPCs adventure ideas (not only for SAGA)

title: The Axon Confrontation
description: An Introductory Justifiers Scenario From the introduction: The team will be beaming to the planet Axon, officially controlled and under exploration by TTMS. They will have to locate the stolen shuttle, then hunt down Major Martell and the rest of his team. Once found, the team must confront Martell and recover the stolen test data and prototype weapons, all the time attempting to avoid direct contact with TTMS.

title: Les Divisions de l'Ombre
description: Les divisions de l'ombre is a French RPG where players are mutant humans with superpowers, persecuted by oppressive governments and megacorporations in the near future (2030). They belong to a secret organization (les Division de l'Ombre) striving for freedom and fighting against threats to mankind.

title: Gladiators of the Roman Empire
description: From the introduction Your opponent falls! He's badly wounded! He can't continue! Yes! Habet! He holds his finger up in a plea for mercy! The choice is yours. Spare his life? Or finish him off? What would you do? User summary: This scenario of gladiatorial combat also was advertised as F.I.S.T.3. Players could either fight against the telephone opponent, Spartacus, or against another player (PvP). Combats allowed players to make periodic selections of fighting stance, aggressiveness, and attack options - by selecting from menu options on the telephone keypad.

title: Stranded!
description: YOU ARE STRANDED ON A DESERT ISLAND! You're on an ocean liner crossing the Pacific when a gigantic wave knocks you overboard.After several hours floating on a wooden crate, you land on the shores of a tropical island. You have no way to get home! You could explore the island, but you can't be sure what you will find. Perhaps you should stay where you are and hope to signal a passing ship. If you decide to stay where you are, turn to page 45. If you decide to go exploring, turn to page 36. But be careful! The island seems deserted, but there could be many dangers waiting for you! On the tropical island, you might come face-to-face with a roaring gorilla. Or you might find people there who will help you find a way home! What happens next while you are stranded depends on the choice you make. Some of your adventures will be scary, some will be exciting - but all of them will be fun! (back of book)

title: Regelwerk
description: The Regelwerk (rules volume) contains the character advancement rules, combat rules, and magic rules of Mächte, Mythen, Moddermonster. In addition to the Regelwerk, you also need the Charakterwerk (character volume) to play.

title: TSR 1990 Product Catalogue
description: From the introduction: Letter from the prosident The year 1989 has been a landmark year for TSR. In all of our product lines, we have seen tremendous success and growth. The launch of the AD&D 2nd Edition product line has recieved consumer acceptance far beyond our wildest dreams, and our book line has, according to LOCUS Magazine, reached a level of prominence second only to Ballantine/Del Rey/Fawcett. From a retail and manufacturing point of view, the expansion of the player base, and revitalizing of the marketplace bodes well for the new product in 1990. While this catalogue is a testament to the future, is is also an oppertunity to thank you for your efforts of the past. We at TSR do not hesistate to boast that 1990 will be geometrically more successful than our best year to date, 1989. Lorraine D. Williams President

title: You Are a Genius
description: From publisher blurb: The reader has just finished graduate school at the age of 14 and must decide what to do with a genius-level IQ. Will the reader go into business and make a fortune or work for the government designing spaceships?

title: Ironhedge Manifesto
description: From the introduction: Complete Quantum Role Playing System Fun - Concise Ironhedge Rulebook Plus: 12 Character Cards & 6 Encounter Cards ... Ancient Fantasy Role Playing Adventure ... Ironhedge Manifesto ... Game of Swordfights, Thiefery, Magic, Treasure, Monsters, Power, & Lawlessness ... (Not For Idiots) User summary: Published Marne, MI, USA; $7.00 - includes cardstock-cover rulebook, 12 character cards, and 6 encounter cards

title: Hintergrundwerk
description: The Hintergrundwerk (background volume) describes the world of Meryllia. The first half of the book includes the history as well as descriptions of the lands, languages, religions, and diseases. The second half contains a bestiary and encounter tables.

title: Domain of Xantree
description: From cover of the book: The Domain of Xantree is a universal Fantasy Role-Playing Gaming (FRPG) adventures usable with most FRPG systems with little to no alterations

title: Projekt J.A.S
description: User summary Projekt J.A.S is a universal/generic scenario that is set in 1980s Sweden. The characters are hired by the Swedish Security Service SÄPO to investigate an information leak about the development of the Swedish jet fighter JAS.

title: Die Erdenfeuer von Geredhar
description: User summaryDie Erdenfeuer von Geredhar (The Earth Fires of Geredhar) is a German generic fantasy adventure. The player characters are sent to rediscover a long forgotten dwarven mine where the magical dragon crystals can be found.

title: China: Why Was an Army Made of Clay?
description: Publisher's blurb: As an Earth Inspector, the reader tries to solve the riddle of the army made of clay.

title: South Pole Sabotage
description: From publisher blurb: On board the "Pole Star" to investigate ozone depletion over the South Pole, a series of decisions by the reader may mean the success or failure of the mission.

title: Ysgarth Bestiary
description: From the introduction: A Guide to creatures from the world of Ysgarth. [Includes] four dozen creatures, described and illustrated, plus a complete short adventure and more.

title: Renegade Dreams
description: From the back of the bookYou don't hear the constant drone of the street, or the blaring ads of the video billboards. You don't notice the garish colors of the street vendors, hawking everything from slapcaps to pirated senso reels. You don't smell the oxides and sulfides from the factories every time the wind shifts. Even the occasional gunshot is hardly worth a glance. If you heard it, it wasn't meant for you. You don't notice, because you live here, and it all fades to the background. What you do notice is that your credit is starting to wear a little thin, and you could use some work... So it begins. A simple interview from an electronic hiring board turns out to be more trouble than you expected, and you expected a lot, since the employer is AzBio, perhaps the most powerful megacorp on the planet. You should have guessed when you saw the reconstructive surgery option on the contract... As a bonus, Renegade Dreams also includes the full cyberspace rules for the SpaceTime universe, as well as background on how to intearate it into this and other adventures.

title: Mutiny in Space
description: From publisher blurb: When a mutiny occurs on your space vessel, you need to choose which side you will fight for!

title: Nova Force
description: High Adventure in the Year 8919 A science-fiction RPG set in the year 8919 that plays up high-tech characters and items like battlesuits.

title: Masques
description: From the back of the book : You'll find in this book : - a complete guide of Venice - a description of the "Compagnons de Janus" - new player aids for Athanor RPG - a large campaign in Venice "Venise en 2306. Alors que les cérémonies du Boulier vont commencer, le carnaval bat son plein. Les Arlequins et les Colombines se pourchassent de passerelles en passerelles, au-dessus des ruelles inondées de la Cité des Doges. Autour de la Place Saint-Marc, des jeunes gens en costumes noir et blancs distribuent des tracts invitant à la communion universelle, tandis que discrètement on évacue de l'un des casinos une personne dont le coeur n'a pas résisté aux Simulateurs de réalité..."

title: GAELCON-89 MegaTraveller Role-Playing Competition
description: From the introduction: Thuneche is a planet in the player's sector that for many a year was criminally mismanaged by the corrupt rulers. The Imperial Navy has had to intervene in a humanitarian gesture supported by the populace. There is currently battling widespread famine, disease, and poverty. However, spurred by a recent film made showing the scenes of tragedy, "Peace Relief", the heart of the sub-sector has gone out to Thuneche and relief aid is pouring in. The players are a group of doctors escorting a shipment of medical supplies to the plague stricken world. By Imperial Naval law, any ship travelling any segment of the journey must give priority passage if such is available. They first segment from Caw to Locksure was pretty bad, being on a tramp freighter, "The Drunken Harlot". To make up for it their administrative leader Wanda Womyan argued especially hard with a Luxury Liner, The Star Queene, convincing its chief steward that things could be made bad for Arnelia Lines if they were refused. Unfortunately because of the short connection time, most of their personal baggage was lost although the supplies were transferred. They drug for jump as usual and the scenario begins when they regain consciousness on the morning of Oneday.

title: The DM's Book of Nasty Tricks and Misfit Magic
description: From the introduction: Welcome, my fellow DM's. Are your players getting around the evil traps set for them? Is your campaign becoming dull, as monsters are obliterated and players cart enough gold out of your dungeon to pave streets with it? Are they killing those hard-created monsters of yours? Are they trashing a week's hard campaign management and design in an our, and then looking for more? Fear no more. The DM's Book of Nasty Tricks & Misfit Magics is a hellish compendium of ideas, tricks, traps, and specially designed material to help any fantasy campaign. This book is a DM's guide to monstrous ideas that will liven any game, as you put the fear of death back into your players. Along with new ideas are many useful tables and charts that can add random events to liven your campaign. The rear of the book is a new idea called Fantasy Real Estate, page of places for sale that your adventurers can buy to call home.

title: U.S.A.: What is the Great American Invention?
description: Publisher's blurb: As an Earth Inspector, the reader tries to uncover the mystery of the great American invention.

title: Stock Car Champion
description: From publisher blurb: The reader most choose between being a mechanic for a winning driver, or opting to be a driver that competes!

title: The Hidden Blueprints Game
description: Book 2 of the Biggles Adventure Games series. (from the cover) Exciting new adventure game. Mysteries to Solve. Maps to follow. Codes to crack. Another title in the Adventure Game Book series and based on W.E.Johns' characters, in this story Biggles and his team go on a secret mission.

title: Omnigon: The Alien Analog
description: Additional aliens, equipment, and abilities for the game Omnigon.

title: European Entertainment
description: This add-on for Les Divisions de l'Ombre contains: - a 4-panel gamemaster screen - a 64 pages booklet describing European Entertainment, an entertainment megacorporation. It describes sports, TV game shows (all suitably violent)... There are also erratas for the game rules and 2 scenarios.

title: The Rings of Allion
description: The Rings of Allion was a direct sequel to FIST Adventure 1: Castle Mammon, and play occurred in another portion of the dungeon of the same castle. It was also advertised as F.I.S.T.2.

title: Il Segreto degli Albelis
description: From the introduction: On a late, stormy afternoon you come to the outskirts of the small village of Askgart. The wind carries the pungent smell of salt and the rhythmic noise of the surf. You are at the crossroads, waiting for the mysterious person who asked for your immediate help. User summary: This scenario was played in the first Italian National Dungeons & Dragons Championship Tournament in November 1988. The scenario is written for AD&D but includes conversion rules for Kata Kumbas, Uno Sguardo nel Buio, and I Signori del Caos.

title: Westhedge Manifesto
description: From the introduction: For use with Ironhedge Role Playing System Fun - Concise Westhedge Rulebook Plus: 12 Character Cards & 6 Encounter Cards ... Play Tested 8 Years ... Ages 1 & Up ... Old West Adventure ... Old West Role Playing Supplement Westhedge Manifesto Game of Gunfights, Saloon Brawls, Robberies, Greed, & Lawlessness (not for Morons) ... "plus BLACKWORLD FRONTIER" User summary: Published Marne, MI, USA; $7.00 - includes cardstock-cover rulebook, 12 character cards, and 6 encounter cards

title: Der König soll sterben
description: Der König soll sterben (The King Shall Die) contains two adventures for characters of levels 1 and 2. The first adventure is a classic dungeon run leading the characters into a forgotten temple. The second is a murder mystery in which the characters are suspected of murdering the king and have to find the actual murderer.

title: Wares Blade Expansion Set 1
description: Expansion boxed set includes an added Rule Book (includes character professions, advanced rules, more mecha information and additional spells), the Western World Guide (with more information on the campaign area, NPCs, and additional monsters that could be found there), and a map of the campaign area.

title: Charakterwerk
description: The Charakterwerk (character volume) contains the character creation rules of Mächte, Mythen, Moddermonster. The largest part of the book is dedicated to the 30 character classes and their powers and spells. In addition to the Charakterwerk, you also need the Regelwerk (rules volume) to play.

title: MicroCiv
description: City was a live action role-playing game the designer created at the age of 9 that was played from 1989 to 1996. It involved kids of the neighborhood creating and managing their own governments and economies however they saw fit. The result was a grand strategy game involving business, war, industry, crime, and complex social dynamics. In 2023 the game was brought back under the name MicroCiv with a new contemporary ruleset.

title: Aventures pour Animonde
description: From the introduction (translated from french): "This extension includes several scenarios for Animonde, with one thing in common: they allow playing only one person. This way of playing is quite different from playing a party group."

title: EsperAgents
description: EsperAgents provides background information and alternative rules to allow play in a genre of psychic espionage and supernatural investigation. While the supplement was intended for use with To Challenge Tomorrow, much of the information provided is generic and could be used in any similar game.

title: RAPIER - Haltiaroolipeli
description: Translated from the introduction: RAPIER is a pointy sword, which is nibble and light and thus a very suitable weapon prescisely for elves. RAPIER is role-adventure-game, in which the events occur in the Elven Kingdom of Ilanador on the continent named Tanar. RAPIER is fantasy roleplaying game. It doesn't try to simulate real life of the middle ages and it's combat rules are not meant for students of medieval martial arts. The goal has been to make easily learned, fluently playable, interesting and perfectible game, which suits both beginners and a bit more advanced players. In RAPIER the Game master has more responsibility than in some other well known games. This is intentional prescisely to make the game more free and genuine and not just a fat collection of rules and tables. In RAPIER your character can try to do whatever comes to mind, without needing a pre-purchased "skill". Whatever your character tries to do, the solution is Game master's announced success percentage and your dice role. You can format your character into exactly the shape you want, without any confining profession or class restrictions. Not even a fantasy worl needs to be filled with stereotypical wizards, thiefsand knights. Normal adventurer can develop him/herself in to what ever direction wished and acquire the skills they want. Introduction in finnish: RAPIER tarkoittaa pistomiekkaa eri säilää, joka näppäryytensä ja keveytensä ansiosta on erinomaisen sopiva ase juuri haltijoille. RAPIER on rooliseikkailupeli, jonka tapahtumat ja seikkailut sijoittuvat Ilanadorin Haltiavaltakuntaan Tanarin mentereelle. RAPIER on fantasiaroolipeli. Se ei pyri simuloimaan aitoa keskiaikaista elämänmenoa eivätkä sen taistelusäännöt ole tarkoitettu keskiaikaisten taistelutapojen tutkijoille. Päämääränä on ollut tehdä helposti opittava, sujuvasti pelattava, mielenkiintoinen ja kehittämiskelpoinen peli, joka sopii sekä vasta-alkajille että jo hieman enemmän pelanneille. RAPIERissa vastuuta Pelinjohtajalla on enemmän kuin joissakin tunnetuissa roolipeleissä. Tämä on tarkoituksellista juuri siksi, että peli on tällöin vapaampaa ja aidompaa, eikä vain paksu kokoelma sääntöpykäliä ja taulukoita. RAPIERissa voi hahmosi koettaa tehdä mitä mieleen juolahtaa ilman, että sillä täytyy olla etukäteen hankittu "taito" halutussa toiminnassa. Mitä tahansa hahmosi koettaakin tehdä, ratkaisu on Pelinjohtajan ilmoittama onnistumisprosentti ja sinunn nopanheittosi yhdistelmä. Pelihahmosi saat muodostaa juuri haluamaksesi, ilman mitään ahtaita ammatti- tai luokkarajoja. Eihän fantasiamaailmankaan tarvitse olla täynnä stereotyypisiä velhoja, varkaita ja ritareita. Normaali seikkailija voi kehittää itseään toivomaansa suuntaan ja hankkia niitä taitoja, joita itse haluaa.

title: Rascals, Rogues, Rapscallions, and Renegades
description: Encounter tables for use with the Pandora's Dice Wheel product, allowing for generation of random villainous NPCs for use with any fantasy RPG. Introduced at a "Bulldog" Comic Con in Dallas, Texas in 1989, as a companion to the Pandora's Dice Wheel.

title: L'Ecran
description: This is the GM screen for Athanor. It includes a 12 page adventure called "Les Rêves de Merlin".

title: Ecran (Warhammer le Jeu de Rôle Fantastique)
description: Jeux Descartes (the French publisher of the first edition of Warhammer FRP) published their own gamemaster screen for the game. The packaging included only the screen and no extra material. The players' side was illustrated with the covers of Empire in Flames, Warhammer City, Something Rotten in Kislev and The Restless Dead.

title: Dragonlance: Time of the Dragon
description: This is Dragonlance item 1050, Time of the Dragons for AD&D 2nd edition. ISBN: 0-88038-773-4. From Drive Through RPG: When the true gods punished Istar by wreaking the Cataclysm on Krynn, a shower of meteors pounded the continent of Ansalon. Halfway around the world, a similar continent was shattered by a single, enormous meteor. Thousands of square miles of land disappeared beneath a smoking sea of magma, which boiled up from beneath the planet's crust. Mountain ranges were toppled, rivers changed course, and weather patterns were altered. Survivors were scattered and isolated. The devastation was nearly complete. Centuries later, the cultures and societies which rise out of the ruins are uniquely shaped by this savage environment. The minotaurs with their eloquent diplomats, elite legions, and gladiatorial contests, are spreading their influence throughout the hemisphere. Wild elves fight territorial wars with humans, kender, and gnomes. Fearsome fire minions rampage around the coasts of the lava ocean while the Followers of Hith seek to dominate the land. Time of the Dragon includes two information-packed books totaling 160 pages, four full-color maps, and 24 individual color plates showing maps, NPCs, and major races.

title: The Temple of Andar
description: From the front cover: Pirates have been raiding local shipping, but not just ant pirates. These are different, cunning and dangerous, and definitely not human! Only a handful of survivors have lived to tell the tale of these attacks - a tale filled with horror. After being contracted to investigate and put a stop to the acts of piracy, you discover the Temple. You soon realize this is much more than you can handle by yourself - but by then it is too late! A Fantasy Role-Playing Adventure for Character Levels 5-7.

title: 10.000$ Reward
description: Publisher's blurb: Dommage etranger... Effacez vos souvenirs d'enfance, les gentils Cow - Boys n'ont jamais existé. L'ouest sauvage est à vous mais n'oubliez pas que pour une poignée de dollards les coyotes égorgent sans pitié.

title: You Are a Superstar
description: From publisher blurb: The reader has always been pretty good in sports but nothing special. Then he or she suddenly begins doing phenomenally at everything, a doctor announces that the reader has undergone a genetic shift that has created superstar potential--at anything!

title: Creatures from the Depths
description: (From the back of the book) Kidnapping a princess and holding her to ransom is a risky business in the City of Salos, where the Usurper’s guards are everywhere crushing rebellion. As Edrix, Prince of Shadows, you must snatch her from the Usurper’s iron grasp and give your pursuers the slip as you flee through the uncharted world of tombs and sewers beneath the City! But which of the Creatures from the Depths is friend, and which is foe? You will need to have your wits about you, and use the book’s unique system of clues and skills, to create your own role-playing adventure, and come out of it alive...

title: Ironworld Box Set
description: This slip-case-over-box set included: - Ironhedge Manifesto - Codex Eternals booklet - Set of Ironworld tabbed index cards - Character cards - Encounter cards - Small GM Screen - Advertising materials

title: Den Fremmede og Falslet
description: Author's blurb: There has been peace in the country around Fosselfloden for several years. Life in Falslet, where Herg Væselklo, Hirna Grankvist, Friedrich der Krieger, Torstein Haraldsson, Fenja Bjarkesdottir, Appolodorus Krysalgiates and Old Bjarke "Troll Lamps" Ulfurson live, has gradually returned to the everyday routine. A routine that the honorable heroes didn't experience when they served as the area's protectors.... but that was all many years ago. One day, this routine is suddenly broken. A stranger in shredded clothes comes to the village. Before he has the opportunity to explain himself, he falls unconscious. It's impossible to shake him awake. But in the backpack of the man there is a letter that explains why this man has searched Falslet for the small group of former professional heroes.

title: World War II Code Breaker
description: Publisher blurb This book is a time machine. Travel back 50 years and decipher secret messages.

title: Les Œufs de Karlatt
description: From the back Trois aventures meurtrières très détaillées et conçues par un joueur français. Translation Three very detailed, murderous adventures, designed by a French player.

title: Ulloq Nunaqarfinnguagaluami
description: Author's blurb: Angmagssalik, January '59 RESEARCH INVESTIGATION TO KANGEQ A small hole of a country, Kangeq, has been out of touch with the outside world for a month due to the East Greenland volcano. Now things have settled down and a rescue expedition is organized under the management of the Chief Officer, H. Ibsen. Before the rescue is accomplished, the party must overcome several obstacles including: * snowy landscape * frozen water * a grim monster or two * more snowy landscape * the one and only Otto, penguin in exile Warm clothes are recommended!

title: Comedia Infernal
description: From the book: Ibrahim Hadikah, dueño de la tienda de antiguedades Abraham Gar den (hadikah en Turco significa Jardín), acaba de conseguir una extraña obra de arte. Se trata del Trapezoedro Brillante, una joya de un mineral desconocido y tamaño considerable (pesa dos kilos), ro bada hace cinco años en el British Mu seum. Esta joya tiene la extraña propiedad de invocar a Nyarlathotep, cuando se haya en total oscuridad. Con intención de venderlo sin que la Policía lo descubra, pone un enigmático anuncio en el Boston Globe.

title: Tusmørkets Smådjævle
description: Publisher's blurb: Fra Sabbath I omtalen: Søndag d. 21. januar er en lille gruppe, som tæller fem studerende fra Københavns Universitet, samlet hos en fælles bekendt til AD&D-rollespil. Under den rolige overflade ulmer der mystiske begivenheder og efter at have spillet dette scenarie, må man spørge sig selv: Hvem tør stole på en rollespiller. "Tusmørkets Smådjævle" er fra DRF-Con 1989 - Der bliver spillet 2 hold af 5 spillere på hvert.

title: La Terre Creuse
description: The core rulebook for the Terre Creuse rpg. It contains the game rules, a description of the world, its (lack of) technology, the different factions that rule it and those who oppose them, rules and background for the three types of magic, and an 8 pages scenario.

title: Sandhold
description: From the front cover: Shipwrecked! Stranded on an island you've only heard whispered legends of, you must use all of your resources to stay alive and find a way home. The key to your rescue must lie in the castle made of sand and inhabited by a fiendish creature who doesn't want you to escape! A Fantasy Role-Playing Module for Character Levels 1-3 User note: The module lacks artwork and maps that were to be produced by the co-author John C. Benson Jr. who passed away before it was complete, therefore the module was never published.

title: Master of Kung Fu
description: From publisher blurb: Your friend Billy has been studying kung fu. Although you haven't been studying it, you still get to travel to China with him on a class trip. When you get to China, though, Billy disappears!

title: Wares Blade Screen
description: GM screen with 4 section double sided GM screen covered with game rule information and a booklet included that has the adventure "Plundering People of LesCard", general NPCs, and a a selection of adventure plots.

title: The Mail Order Hobby Shop 1989 Illustrated Catalog
description: The Mail Order Hobby Shop Your Gaming Adventure Source! 1989 Illustrated Catalog! Thousands of Items! Your Single Gaming Source!

title: Brunnsäventyret
description: Publisher's blurb: Call of Cthulhu går i en omgång och tar ca 30 lag. Tänk er en idyllisk hälsobrunn belägen i en av 1700-talets orörda sjumilaskogar. En plats där kropp och själ styrks genom gyttjebad och inmundigande av mineralhaltigt vatten. Livet på brunnen ter sig lugnt, kanske till och med lite långtråkigt, men under den stillsamma fasaden frodas namnlösa fasor... Call of Cthulhu är ett spel som bygger på H.P. Lovecrafts rika produktion av skräcklitteratur. Spelarnas förmåga att samla ledtrådar och lösa gåtor sätts på prov. När sanningen uppdagas är den ofta skrämmande och fruktansvärd.

title: En ring av blod
description: Publisher's blurb: Detta år en tävling där rollspelet och underhållningsvärdet kommer att vara bedömningpgrunderna. Total rättvisa eftersträvas alltså inte. Namnet på del ett är: En ring av blod. Man får ställa upp i något av kvalen och de kommer att spelas av fyramannalag som sammansåtts slumpvis. I finalen kommer fyra fyramannalag att få spela. User summary: This scenario is published as two PDF files: 34-page Scenario 9-page Characters (print-and-play)

title: 13: Assassin Comics Module #1
description: From the Back Cover: In this Issue: "The Awakening Storm" By Mike W. Barr, Robb Phipps and Alfredo Alcala. After Decades of imprisonment by the evil Brotherhood, Agent 13 breaks free. With renewed vengeance he is deadlier than ever. He's 13: Assassin! Also in this issue: "The Final Weapon" by Scott Haring, Frank Springer and Larry Mahlstedt. Plus: The first set of Agent 13 collector game cards. 24 cards in full color with two exciting games to play. In addition, game stats for major characters for use with the Top Secret/S.I. game and Agent 13 sourcebook! From the Inside Cover: 13:Assassin and Final Weapon features the 1990s adventures of TSR's mystical spy, Agent 13. The leader of an ancient society was literally ripped apart by 13 in 1939 and his head has been stored in a box ever since. Now he's back with a vengeance. In Final Weapon, we begin the destruction of the spy organizations WEB and ORION. The 13:Assassin Collector Game Cards debut in this issue, and will expand in future issues.

title: Destiny Deck
description: The Destiny Deck is an RPG accessory designed to be used with any Roleplaying Game system, in any genre. As a game aid, it will yield instant scenarios for: on-the-fly playing; time-limited games; "bridging" vignettes and the vignettes within; fleshing out a character's background; etc. It is also quite fun and useful as a "Game Masters' Workshop" device to improve Game Mastering skills, from concept to story telling. End publisher's description. The Destiny Deck consists of 108 cards and is subdivided into four decks: Setting Atmosphere Challenge Bonus The game with a four-page instruction booklet detailing many different ways to use the cards. This won an Origins award for Best Game Accessory of 1993.

title: 1991 TSR Product Catalogue
description: A complete catalogue of all products available from TSR through 1991 including new items and backlists.

title: Erikoisjoukot
description: From the back of the book (translated from Finnish): Spetsialnoja Nazranie, Morskaja Pekhota, Vozdushnija Desanti, SAS, SEAL, U.S.Rangers, Special Service Force, Parachute Regiment, SBS, Mountain & Arctic Warfare Cadre RM, Green Berets, Delta Force, 82. All American, Gurkhas, Gebirgsjäger, Fallschirmjäger, 7. Luzcyka Dywizya Desantnova-Morska These are only a part of the special forces included in this Twilight: 2000 sourcebook. And that is not all. It also includes complete character creation aid and background info on different special forces. The book also includes over 100 new illustrated weapons that the special forces use. Pistols range from the humble FN mk.1 to the elephant stopping Casull .454 magnum. If you have ever wondered what a Dum-Dum or a steel cap bullet does when it hits, your questions are answered in Erikoisjoukot -sourcebook. As an extra, the weapons and vehicle data are also included in second edition format.

title: Realm of the Beast
description: Realm of the Beast is a compaign setting for the Age of Ruin game system.

title: Fun Guys from Yuggoth
description: "A Lovecraftian Nightmare for Macho Women with Guns" "Intro - This is a short adventure for a group of 4 to 8 Macho Women, Renegade Nuns (sans vehicles), or Bat-winged Bimbos, hopefully with some idea what the game is about, a knowledge of the various books and stories of the late H. P. Lovecraft, and a bizarre sense of humor. It all begins on a bright summer day, on the beach..."

title: Rolemaster Character Records
description: Cover/Jacket Text: Tired of thumbing through book after book and scribbling notes on notebook pages while designing your Rolemaster character? Ever wish you had all the information about your character-skills, skill costs, stats, spell lists, next-level developments, etc., all on a few well-organized pages? Wait no longer! The Rolemaster Character Records are here. Each profession's individual character sheets provide: Specific development point costs and level bonuses for every Rolemaster skill, integrated into individualized character sheets for every Rolemaster character profession, up to and including Rolemaster Companion IV. Expanded space for skill areas that are frequently broken down into more specific areas for professions which use them most. Plenty of room to detail all of the facets of your favorite character, such as Armor Type, stats, Resistance Roll bonuses, physical and personality traits, equipment, spell lists, background, and modifiers of every type. Extra room left for you to add your own original skills, spell lists, stats, and much more. Rolemaster garners now have an entire fantasy world at their fingertips. Shadow WorldTM products form a rich fantasy environment for the Rolemaster and Fantasy Hero game systems. The self-contained adventures may also be used as isolated or hidden areas in any Gamemaster's campaign world. The completely reformatted 2nd edition Rolemaster system includes the following: Arms Law® & Claw Law® - The Rolemaster Arms and Animals combat systems combined in a new, reorganized volume. These fast-moving rules include individual charts for 30 weapons and critical strike tables, as well as detailed creature attacks for real and mythical beasts. Martial arts rules also are included. Character Law & Campaign Law® - The new version of the complete character development and campaign guide. Character Law features a unique trait development system that allows characters to increase their ability in any skill. There are no absolute restrictions. Campaign Law includes handy reference material available to any Gamemaster: weather, encounter, and price charts, and guidelines for running a campaign in a complex living world. Spell Law® - The magic system that improves any FRP game! The new edition of Spell Law has over 2,000 spell descriptions based on three realms of power and 15 professions. It provides alchemy rules, spell attack and failure tables, and a unique -spell-learning structure.

title: Time Drifters
description: From the back cover: "Included in this set are: Complete TIME DRIFTERS rules. Micro Module 'Dry Gulched at Fort McCallum.' Time Masters Screen" From the introduction: "The Time Drifters role playing game combines the excitement of science fiction with the harsh realiites of the past and the incredible adventures of the future. any hours of enjoyment await all who dare to challenge the Time Masters. Included in this game are all the rules necessary for surviving the deadly enemies that populate the centuries. One campaign may be up to six hours of adventure, or it may be one step in a series of combined adventures. Watch your characters grow in rank and power with each vanquished foe. But be careful, not all who encounter your hero will wish him well. He may become a tasty stone age meal for a hungry Tyrannosaurus Rex. Or perhaps some evil despot will sentence him to the gas chamber in twentieth century Germany. Your roll of the dice may be the only thing keeping your character from a band of marauding Apaches! This set includes your first adventure and is programmed to be played in the Wild West of the USA. Also included are campaign maps and instructions that detail planned encounters. Also, DSI has new and exciting adventures available by mail order. So strap on your life support system, load up your six-shooter, and batten down the hatches! Your first adventure has begun!"

title: The Armstrong Malison
description: user summary A Call of Cthulhu Investigation The investigators received a letter about an old friend who is in trouble in the mining town of Armstrong and set out to rescue him.

title: Wild Things
description: From the cover: For immediate play with the WILDERNESS SURVIVAL GUIDE Across the sun-baked deserts and windswept plains, from the frozen tundras to the deep forests, a world cries out for exploration and adventure. User description: Similar to its twin "Dark and Hidden Ways", this supplement was bundled with the Wilderness Survival Guide. It was attached to copies of the Wilderness Survival Guide by a wraparound sleeve, one side of which has the cover of "Wild Things". It contains eight encounters set in wilderness locations. The encounters are "Ettercaps & Spiders" (2 pages), "Manticores & Griffons" (2 pages), "White Dragon" (2 pages), "Orcs, Orogs and Half-Orcs" (2 pages), "Red Dragon" (8 pages), "Wemics, Lamias, and Thri-Kreen" (7 pages), "Trolls and Centaurs" (3 pages), "Bandits (80)" (4 pages). The remaining two pages in this 32-page booklet are the title/index page, and an advert for the RPGA on the last page.

title: Pohjoismaat: Lähdekirja
description: A sourcebook covering the Nordic countries (Finland, Sweden, Norway, Denmark and Iceland). The book contains the history of the war in the region, current living conditions, important people and organisations, rules for weather, rules for encounters, rules for character creation for the countries, equipment lists, and information on the armies of the countries. The book has only been published in Finland and is therefore completely in Finnish.

title: L'Isola della Peste
description: L'Isola della Peste Supplement with a long adventure. "L'isola della peste" ("The Plague Island") is inspired by the Isola Tiberina, the island on the Tiber at the centre of Rome (Italy). Here the authors, during the summer festivals that made the Roman nights lively, demoed the game.

title: Designing Fantasy Scenarios
description: A system for creating adventures semi-randomly using Tarot cards, includes 3 cardstock sheets with names of the Tarot cards suitable for cutting out if the referee does not have a set. From intro: These ideas and the tables in the rear of this pamphlet contain universal concepts that can be used to augment any role-play system, or they are specially designed to work with a Barony campaign.

title: Magic
description: Sorcerers, Witches, Cults and Organizations From the back cover: "More Street Gangs! New Factions! The Sorcerer - a New PC! Secrets of Target Alpha! Terrifying New Monsters! New Info on Elder Kin!"

title: Edge-On
description: Partially from the back of the book: Rank sewage oozes through the gutters of dark but familiar alleyways, while insect-zapping neon reflects from stagnant pools of oil-slick filth. Assulted by the cloying, sour battery of smells, you know you're home on the streets of civilization's penultimate nightmare: the Sprawl. But, home means safety - a relative term after all - and a base of operations once the sun slips away. From these lonesome and destitue beginnings, legends are born. And it's time you started working on yours, sprawlkid. Cyberadventure Mission File #1

title: Ceux des Profondeurs
description: User Summary This is only available in French. You (one of the PC) receive an letter written by your Uncle, sent from the French Caribeans, in 1923. He seems to be in trouble so you decide to go there to investigate. This is a "generic" horror adventure module, set in 1923, to be played with either SimulacreS, Chill or Call of Cthulhu.

title: Battlelords of the Twenty-Third Century (2nd Edition)
description: " "Battlelords of the Twenty-Third Century is a paper and pencil science fiction role-playing game designed by Lawrence R. Sims and first published in 1990. The game's tagline is Roleplaying in a dangerous future. The Battlelords of the Twenty-Third Century license was later sold by Optimus Design Systems (ODS) to SSDC, Inc. in September 1999. Battlelords of the Twenty-Third Century is set in the year 2279. The territory of the Galactic Alliance, spanning several galaxies, is the primary setting for the game. The Galactic Alliance is made up of twelve races (including Humans), and is run behind the scenes by huge mega-corporations seeking to exploit the farthest reaches of space. Player characters usually assume the role of Battlelords, mercenaries employed by the corporations to further their business by any means, legal or otherwise. They face various challenges, including rival mercenaries, Rebels, hostile alien lifeforms on unexplored worlds, and the alien race known as the Arachnids." From the publisher "Battlelords of the Twenty-Third Century is a deep space roleplaying system that focuses on the Alliance of 27 alien races who desperately seek to ward off the threat of internal destruction while simultaneously exploring the vast uncharted regions of space. For the Battlelord, loyalty is to the company, yet corporate devotion never exceeds allegiance to your friends. The mercenary team embodies everything that is valued in society: esprit de corps, honor, and valor. At least that is what the papers say! Your job is a simple one, do anything and everything to stay alive. The company gets all the press. You get to pick up a paycheck. No one cares about methods, but in the 23rd century, everybody needs a hero! It is a battlefield without boundaries, a cemetery without grounds. It is a land whose beauty is shrouded in mystery and danger. Space offers up its treasures only to those brave enough to challenge themselves. And this is Battlelords Country! "." Source: Wikipedia, "Battlelords_of_the_23rd_Century," available under the CC-BY-SA License.

title: Tales of Terror
description: A self published book of Call of Cthulhu scenario ideas From the Introduction During the course of a Call of Cthulhu campaign the constant demands of inventive investigators can prove to be quite a strain on the poor keeper. A booklet crammed full of aasily adaptaable ideas can be invaluable. Tales of Terror was conceived with this in mind. The 'Tales' can be quickly and easily dropped into any game. While preliminary investigations are being conducted the Keeper has time to decide which (if any) of the three possibilities apply. Further details can be created by the Keeper if required. Many scenarios for Call of Cthulhu are too big. Great Old Ones, R'lyeh, Outer Gods, and monsters the size of mountains all threatening civilization as we know it. In the midst of these major conflicts there should be smaller struggles. A nest of vampires, a haunted house, an unexpected death. Tales of Terror is brimming with these low key investigations that put saving the world into perspective. Tales of Terror is also a source or red herrings and associated leads. On the trail of Deep Ibes? ( or Lloigor? or sinister orientals? or vampires?). There are tales here with the potential to confuse, illuminate and terrify. Ultimately, Tales of Terror is a booklet of ideas. The situations here each have the full potential of being expended into a full blown adventure. A scenario is often the development of one or two isolated ideas. A vision, spark or something. Tales of Terror consists of these ideas distilled out from the descriptive text. Use it as you will.

title: The Preacher and the Cross
description: user summary A Call of Cthulhu Investigation The scenario is about racial hatred and the Ku Klux Klan. The scenario begins with the murder of a Priest.

title: Castle Keitel
description: A Lace & Steel adventure scenario. Includes four pages of character cards describing and illustrating the NPCs in the adventure. Includes details and maps of the Barony of Keitel. From the back of the book: Some eight days ago the Baron Keitel had a hunting accident. Suddenly frightened, the Baron's horse threw him into a thicket where he fell heavily. By the time his rescuers arrived, the Baron was unmoving and unconscious, and has remained that way ever since, weakening day by day as he loses the struggle against death. The family has gathered at the castle to grieve and wait, and tensions build as the question of succession preys on everyone's minds. The castle has become rife with faction and suspicion as the partizans (sp) of the two contenders for the Baronial title intrigue against each other. Even in the town, heated debate as to the outcome of the succession causes disturbances and fights.

title: Companion: Shanthas of Jorune   ...and a Ramian
description: From the introduction: "Shanthas of Jorune... And a Ramian is a convention pre-release. It details for the first time in print Jorune's most mysterious race, the shanthas. These eyeless natives easily manipulate the isho, or ambient energy, to do many things, including weaving orbs and bolts of great sophisticaton. Their powerful technology for creating dyshas, warps, sarceens, evids, cle-eshtas, and the powerful elip-ston are described within. You will learn how the shanthas evolved on Jorune, understand their seven religious sects and read their mythology. The shanthas themselves will be described physically, and many questions left in the past to reader's imaginations will have answers"

title: Heavy Metal
description: The Heavy Metal roleplaying game box set contains everything needed to start playing. It includes empty character sheets and three books: - "Style de jeu et scénarios" covers the game background, the rules system and scenarios. The game system is rather simple (stats multiplied by a skill level give a percentage change of success). The background describes a dystopian near-future society, where the rich nations of the north live off the resources of the impoverished south and the northern citizens, brainwashed by the omnipresent entertainment Networks live in xenophobic fear of "Southern Terrorists". Characters can either be U.R.C. (Unité de Répression Cybernétique), robotic cops who are judge, jury and executioners, or "Egarés" (the Lost), rebels using their meager resources trying to escape URCs and uncover the truth behind the mysterious Hopson Plan. The book includes 4 scenarios, "London Leatherboys", "Twist & Shoot", "Bad Religion" and "Le Père Noêl est une ordure". - "Les Egarés" focuses on the Lost. The book contains character and group creation rules (players create their character as well as the group they belong to, its ideology, financial resources, outside contacts, safe houses...) , a presentation of several rebel groups (ecowarriors, neofascists, hackers, TV show hooligans, cultists, communists...) and a list of equipment (guns, vehicles, broadcasting equipment...) - "Les U.R.C." describes the Cybernetic Repression Units. It includes chapter about character creation (type chassis, organic or cybernetic brain, choice of software...), roleplaying tips for U.R.C. characters, a description of laws and justice in the Northern Block, and details about the Hopson Plan.

title: Phil Foglio's What's New 2
description: from the back cover Dragons and Dungeons and Weyrs, Oh My! Phil and Dixie take us on a light-headed look at role-playing games, one of the world's most fanatically pursued pasttimes. Each month for three years, they had readers of Dragon magazine laughing at their games and themselves. Now you can enjoy the fun. Here are over a dozen of the never-before collected installments o fthe series along with the long awaited last chapter, Sex and D&D This edition also contains all of Phil Foglio's covers for Dragon magazine as well as the definitive lowdown on Dixie Null. What's New? 2 is the perfectaddition to any fantasy fan's or gamer's library, and certainly a good complement to the first What's New. It also serves as a fine introduction to the new series now appearing in The Duelist.

title: The Great Adventure Game
description: user summary Edition 13.2. A fantasy game self-published and given to players by Robert Cunningham and Stan Love, the designers, in Anchorage, Alaska. Playtests ran in the early 1990's at Games People Play, in the University Center.

title: In the Musical Vein
description: From the back of the book Play it Hard... In the Musical Vein were the dead folks jam. Where the best resurrection bands bombard the crowd with the hottest sounds around. The place where it all begins. Play it Fast... Don’t be caught stepping too slow or you may be the next Kin to disappear without a trace. Is it Alpha? Is it a rival Faction? Or is it something even worse? Play it Loud... Make the amps scream in rage the way you will when you find out what your enemies are up to. Their fates will soon be in your hands. > Details of the NightLife music scene > Hunting system with Prey encounters > Research results on the dreaded Pox > New Races > New Enemies > New Factions

title: Robbers of the Sea (Text)
description: From the introduction: It is March 19, 1342 (First Tuesday After the Passion, 16 Edward III). The characters are natives of the city of Great Yarmouth (Magna Jernemuth) on the eastern coast of Norfolk. Edward III is King of England, and although the economy is unstable because of the war in France, the Norfolk coast is kept prosperous by active merchants who are involved in trade, smuggling and even piracy. User summary: This text-only adventure was published on the internet in 1991. It was intended for use with the Ysgarth, To Challenge Tomorrow, or Advanced Dungeons & Dragons games but could be easily adapted to nearly any role-playing system. The adventure was re-worked and re-published in 2002 for Oroborus - see Robbers of the Sea.

title: Jenseits von Kalkamal
description: A german Cthulhu scenario book by publisher Laurin, contains translations of two Chaosium scenarios, "The Pits of Bendal-Dolum" ("Jenseits von Kalkamal") and "The Temple of the Moon" ("Tempel des Mondes"). These two scenarios are set in the 1920s in the Middle and South Americas. Content translations from the back: "Jenseits von Kalkamal" On the rescue for a lost expedition the fearless investigators enter the jungles of British Honduras and Guatemala, where they encounter ancient temples - and a horror from their nightmares... "Tempel des Mondes" The broken part of a golden tableau leads to an archaeological dig in Peru and there on the trails of antiquity robbers, a group of cultist and an evil even worse...

title: Labyrinth of Laughter
description: This is the first scenario collection for the Dragon Half RPG. Included scenarios are: Chapter 1: The false Dick Saucer appears! Chapter 2: Dragon Harp Quest Chapter 3: Fuper go! Go! Go! Chapter 4: The naked prince

title: The Alchemist of Istanbul
description: A stand-alone Role-Playing game supplement to the Daughter of Serpents videogame From the introduction: Welcome to The Alchemist of Istanbul, a role-playing game for up to six players and a Director, based on the SIGNOS computer role-playing system. Although The Alchemist of Istanbul can be played by itself, the story in it forms a prequel to the SIGNOS computer drama Daughter of Serpents.

title: Gatecrasher
description: "High Tech High Fantasy Roleplaying" Gatecrasher is a very entertaining setting in the 24th century. Magic has returned to the solar system, after we had colonized other planets and moons. The mix of magic and technology, spiced up with delightful humor, makes for a fun gaming setting. Well written in a humorous style, the system is very complex and capable of fine detail.

title: KinRise
description: From the back of the book The Kin during nuclear winter - The fall of a new night Witches and covens, ceremonial magic, new spells, the Sidhe, Sidhe culture and magic Live Fast - play a Vampire Live Free - play a Werewolf Live Forever - play a Sorcerer ___________________________________________ KinRise offers new rules, magic and more for your NightLife game. Experience life as a creature of night in the post-apocalyptic world

title: Mutazoids 2nd Edition
description: From the back cover Mutazoids 2nd edition is a post-holocaust role-playing game. It takes place in a dark future with political and racial overcasts caused by governmental suppression of the mutant majority. Players create Enforcers - the futures equivalent to police officers who carry out laws passed by the cruel government known as the Second Republic. Mutazoids 2nd edition contains 30 more pages than the original game. These pages include more information on secret political organizations, new equipment, a beginning scenario... plus a lot more. The year is 2173, one-hundred and sixty years after an accidental virus was released into the earth's atmosphere. It caused death to over 80 percent of the world's population. The majority that survived are mutated, and society is slowly crumbling. It is up to you to keep chaos from prevailing. That is your job... you are an Enforcer!

title: Le Petit Peuple r.p.g.
description: This French RPG has been published in Casus Belli (Issue 70 - Jul 1992) magazine. This humourous RPG is set with the Petit Peuple (little people) who have evaded the perception of the humans. They live underground. Each player plays a small creature (troll, gnome, dwarf, elf, smurf, or any small creature -humanoid - that the players want) who will participate in the adventure planned for the day. The characters do not evolve, and the players are encouraged to create new characters for each adventures.

title: To Challenge Tomorrow (4th Edition)
description: Complete Basic Rules From the back cover (spelling corrected): "To Challenge Tomorrow is the future of roleplaying. It's the first and only roleplaying system to provide pure mechanics for use in any setting which are versatile, believable, consistent and simple. Take your favorite roleplaying setting, rip out the second rate mechanics which so often plague otherwise great games, and plug in the elegant flexibility of To Challenge Tomorrow, a game system which emphasizes character development and roleplaying without sacrificing realism. And once you've discovered the joy of roleplaying without arbitrary restrictions and mechanical glitches, you can move on to try out some of the dozens of To Challenge Tomorrow settings, such as London by Night for Victorian roleplaying, Challengers for superhero roleplaying, EsperAgents for psychic espionage and many, many others. The new fourth edition To Challenge Tomorrow rules are completely revised and updated.
